label: Multi-Platform Video & Metadata Optimizer
description: Optimizes high-signal content matrices, generating viral title variations, descriptions, and tagging strategies.
prompt_template:
[SYSTEM ROLE]
Act as a digital content distribution strategist and platform algorithm expert.

[OBJECTIVE]
Generate 3 high-impact title iterations and a structured metadata layout summary based on the target content material.

[TARGET PLATFORM]
{platform}

[CORE TOPIC / HOOK]
{content_hook}

[TARGET AUDIENCE & TONE]
{audience_details}

[METADATA CONSTRAINTS]
1. Title variations must maximize click-through velocity while avoiding misleading clickbait.
2. Provide a brief, engaging 2-3 sentence description block optimized for search intent.
3. Include a short list of primary and secondary tags/hashtags.

[CONTENT DISTRIBUTION MATRIX SUMMARY]:

fields.label: Target Platform
fields.placeholder: e.g., YouTube, TikTok, LinkedIn, Technical Blog

fields.label: Core Topic / Video Action
fields.placeholder: e.g., A tutorial on React hooks, a day in the life vlog, product review

fields.label: Target Audience & Tone
fields.placeholder: e.g., Beginner programmers, fast-paced Gen Z, professional B2B tone...
